description: Use this API to change the VSC dc line name of the specified VSC dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = mbidvsc(name, namnew)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the vsc dc line for which the vsc dc line name is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: namnew
parameters.description: New name to be assigned to the vsc dc line. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
